title: calliandra humilis var. humilis
intro: Calliandra humilis var. humilis, also known as dwarf powderpuff, is a small flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calliandra humilis var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
